title: Hero of the Village Plus - Better Villagers and Extra Trades
description: ✨ A better, more complete and meaningful Hero of the Village effect granting better trades!
body:
Defending a village from a raid should feel like a monumental achievement. But in vanilla Minecraft, risking your life and your gear usually just rewards you with a temporary, slight discount on basic items. Not anymore.

**Hero of the Village Plus** completely overhauls the reward system for completing a raid. It transforms the "Hero of the Village" effect into a highly valuable, progression-based mechanic that gives you access to epic late-game loot, massive item yields, and exclusive trades that make defending villagers truly worth your time.

![Epic Master Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Jcr6svMa/images/2b1c1cbf82553a52e2cc22c164f87ac563598f2c_350.webp)

## Core Features

### Dynamic Master-Tier Trades
When you have the Hero of the Village effect, Master-level (Level 5) villagers will reveal a secret stash of up to 5 brand new, exclusive trades. These trades are dynamically unlocked based on the level of your potion effect. If you have Hero of the Village Level 1, you unlock the first tier. If you manage to get Level 5, you unlock all five epic trades!

These exclusive trades feature a distinct green background in the UI so you can easily spot them.

![Dynamic Trade Unlocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Jcr6svMa/images/993311fa70405d5cd31830bcc83259aa401f43d3.gif)

### Vanilla Trades Bonus Yield
The benefits don't stop at new trades. The mod also heavily buffs the standard vanilla trades you already know and love. If a trade costs exactly 1 Emerald (or yields exactly 1 Emerald for items), the amount of items you receive is multiplied based on your effect level and configuration settings. Watch single items turn into massive stacks instantly! 

![Vanilla Trades Bonus Yield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Jcr6svMa/images/88bedb6906949879dc3f1d4b1a26dcdbb2870a1b.gif)

### Smart and Deterministic Generation
To prevent players from exploiting the system by simply closing and opening the menu to reroll enchantments, the mod uses a deterministic algorithm. The unique trades, colors, and enchantments a villager offers are permanently tied to that specific villager's unique ID. A Master Armorer will always offer the exact same enchanted diamond chestplate to you, making each villager uniquely valuable.

### Fully Configurable
Want to adjust how much extra loot you get? Or maybe disable the vanilla bonus yields and only keep the exclusive trades? The mod includes full Cloth Config integration, allowing you to tailor the experience exactly to your liking directly from the in-game menu.

![In-Game Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0176595c8557c75c784198e1e344c80a60e33f16.png)

***

## Master Trades Loot Tables and Probabilities

Below is the complete guide to what every single villager profession can offer you. Remember: you must level up the villager to Master (Level 5) for these to appear, and you will unlock one trade tier per level of the Hero of the Village effect you currently have.

![Complete Trades Infographic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bb570c4c16d06f6e1640e99cbffd00d7022dd21.png)

### The Reward Matrix

| Profession | Tier 1 (HOTV Lv.1) | Tier 2 (HOTV Lv.2) | Tier 3 (HOTV Lv.3) | Tier 4 (HOTV Lv.4) | Tier 5 (HOTV Lv.5) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Armorer** | Netherite Upgrade (1) | Diamond Boots | Diamond Helmet | Diamond Leggings | Diamond Chestplate |
| **Butcher** | Saturation Stew (1) | Bread (50-64) | Cooked Mutton (50-64) | Cooked Porkchop (50-64) | Golden Apple (1-5) |
| **Cartographer**| Brush (1) | Bundle (1) | Spyglass (1) | Heart of the Sea (1) | Recovery Compass (1) |
| **Cleric** | Fermented Spider Eye (2-8)| Ghast Tear (1-5) | Standard Potion (1) | Splash Potion (1) | Strong Splash Potion (1) |
| **Farmer** | Cookie (50-64) | Apple (50-64) | Baked Potato (50-64) | Golden Apple (1-5) | Enchanted Golden Apple (1-2)|
| **Fisherman** | Cooked Cod (50-64) | Axolotl Bucket (1) | Tadpole Bucket (1) | Long Water Breathing Potion | Enchanted Fishing Rod |
| **Fletcher** | Spectral Arrow (50-64) | Tipped Arrow (Weakness) | Tipped Arrow (Slowness) | Enchanted Crossbow | Enchanted Bow |
| **Leatherworker**| Armadillo Scute (3-9) | Random Harness (1) | Wolf Armor (1) | Netherite Nautilus Armor (1)| Netherite Horse Armor (1) |
| **Librarian** | Book (50-64) | Bookshelf (20-35) | Random Wood Shelf (50-64) | Chiseled Bookshelf (50-64)| Max Enchanted Book (1) |
| **Mason** | Random Terracotta (50-64)| Tuff Bricks (50-64) | Red Nether Bricks (50-64)| Random Stained Glass (50-64)| Random Concrete (50-64) |
| **Shepherd** | String (50-64) | Random Wool (50-64) | Random Wool (50-64) | Random Carpet (50-64) | Enchanted Shears |
| **Weaponsmith** | Diamond (6-10) | Netherite Scrap (6-10) | Netherite Upgrade (1) | Enchanted Diamond Axe | Enchanted Diamond Sword |
| **Toolsmith** | Netherite Upgrade (1) | Enchanted Diamond Axe | Enchanted Diamond Hoe | Enchanted Diamond Shovel | Enchanted Diamond Pickaxe |

### Enchantment Probabilities and Details

To ensure the loot feels balanced but highly rewarding, gear provided by these Master trades comes with powerful, pre-determined enchantments based on internal probabilities:

* **Armorer (Diamond Armor):** All armor pieces are guaranteed to have top-tier enchantments. There is a **10% chance** for Protection IV, a **30% chance** for Mending, and a **60% chance** for Unbreaking III.
* **Toolsmith & Weaponsmith (Diamond Tools):** Tools are guaranteed to have Efficiency V, Unbreaking III, and Mending I. Additionally, there is a **50% chance** to get Fortune III, and a **50% chance** to get Silk Touch I.
* **Weaponsmith (Diamond Sword):** Comes maxed out! Guaranteed Sharpness V, Fire Aspect II, Knockback II, Looting III, Sweeping Edge III, Unbreaking III, and Mending I.
* **Fisherman (Fishing Rod):** Guaranteed Unbreaking III and Mending I. Plus, a **50% chance** for Lure III and a **50% chance** for Luck of the Sea III.
* **Fletcher (Bows & Crossbows):** Bows receive Flame, Unbreaking III, Power V, Punch II, and a **50/50 chance** between Mending or Infinity. Crossbows receive Mending, Unbreaking III, Quick Charge III, and a **50/50 chance** between Piercing IV or Multishot.
* **Shepherd (Shears):** Guaranteed to have Efficiency V, Unbreaking III, and Mending I.
* **Librarian (Max Enchanted Book):** The game pulls from the entire enchantment registry and guarantees that the chosen enchantment will be at its **absolute maximum level** (e.g., Sharpness V, Protection IV, etc.).
* **Cleric (Potions):** Tier 3 offers a random standard potion (Fire Resistance, Swiftness, Regeneration, Strength, or Slow Falling). Tier 5 offers strong splash variants (Weakness, Poison, Swiftness, Regen, Healing, or Strength).
